name: list_memories
description:
List every memory in the active BridgeMemory hub, newest-first.

Returns: array of { id, title, fileName, modified, size, outgoingLinks }.
Hub is auto-discovered by walking up from `cwd` (or process cwd) looking for `.bridgememory/`.

cwd.description: Optional. Absolute path used to discover the hub by walking up for `.bridgememory/`. Defaults to the server's process cwd.
